candidate_definition_hints.text: Helmfile has moved home, this codebase is now effectively dead with all new development and bug fixes being done here https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile. Please do star the new repository!!! For more details see this issue https://github.com/roboll/helmfile/issues/1824
